# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-prod

variables:
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: ./artifacts
  BINARIES: binary1, binary2

build-job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Build step"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/binaries.tar.gz
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/configs.conf
    expire_in: 30d

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy-dev
  dependencies:
    - build-job
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to dev"
    - curl -o ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/binaries.tar.gz -sL https://gitlab-ci_cd_test_bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/artifacts/binaries.tar.gz
    - tar xzf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/binaries.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/configs.conf

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy-prod
  dependencies:
    - build-job
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to prod"
    - curl -o ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/binaries.tar.gz -sL https://gitlab-ci_cd_test_bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/artifacts/binaries.tar.gz
    - tar xzf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/binaries.tar.gz -C /usr/local/bin/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/configs.conf
